name: x-mcp-server
description: Connect Claude to Twitter/X via Playwright browser automation — no API key needed
long_description:
# X MCP Server

Connect Claude to your Twitter/X account using Playwright browser automation. No API key required. No manual browser setup.

## First-time setup

1. Install the `.mcpb` bundle in Claude Desktop.
2. On the first tool call, a browser window opens automatically — log in to Twitter/X.
3. The session is saved to `~/.twitter-bridge-mcp/profile/`. No login needed on subsequent runs.

## Configuration (optional)

- `TWITTER_MCP_PROFILE` — custom browser profile directory (default: `~/.twitter-bridge-mcp/profile`)
- `DM_PIN` — 4-digit PIN for Twitter DM unlock screen (if set up)

tools.name: twitter_undo
tools.description: Undo an action: unlike, unretweet, or delete tweet

tools.name: twitter_quote
tools.description: Quote tweet — posts on your timeline with embedded tweet card

tools.name: twitter_my_replies
tools.description: Get your own replies to other tweets

tools.name: twitter_mentions
tools.description: Get mentions and replies to your tweets

tools.name: twitter_view_tweet
tools.description: View a tweet with full details and image URLs
